name: College Town Seasonality
description: University towns show distinct seasonal patterns driven by academic calendars. Compare activity during the school year (Sep-May) versus summer break.
key_findings: Ann Arbor: -22% summer activity drop (highest proportional student population)
Boulder: -18% summer activity drop with tourism offset
Austin: -12% more moderate drop due to larger permanent population
Pattern correlates with academic calendar dates
methodology_notes: Comparison based on average nightlight intensity during academic months vs summer months. Larger cities show smaller percentage changes due to non-student population dilution.
